bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid. The opponent’s opening offer gives me low utility and shows no concession pattern yet, so I will counter with my strongest values across all issues.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession from my previous maximum-utility offer. The opponent has moved slightly on issueC from valueE to valueD, improving my utility a bit, but they are still mostly holding to valueE; I will concede on low-weight issueD while holding firm on my most important issues.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid for myself while making only small concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s offers remain very low for my utility and are not consistently improving, so I am holding firm on the most important issues A, B, and C while varying issueE slightly from my prior bid to avoid exact repetition.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, and the opponent’s offers have not improved for my utility, so I am targeting a high-utility bid rather than making major concessions. I am conceding on the low-weight issueD to valueD, which the opponent has repeatedly offered, while holding firm on my most important issues issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.81 because it is still very early at t=0.08, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has only improved materially on issueC by offering my top value there, while still holding poor values for my high-weight issueA and issueB; I will keep those firm and concede mainly on lower-weight issueD/issueE to avoid repeating my last exact offer.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a modest concession on low-weight issueD in response to the opponent’s latest move toward issueC=valueB and issueD=valueC. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially on issueC, but they remain very weak on my high-weight issueA and issueB, so I will continue holding those at my best values.

I am targeting a high but slightly more conciliatory utility bid because it is still early (t=0.12), so I should hold firm on the high-weight issuesA, issueB, and issueC. The opponent has begun conceding on issueC and a little on issueB/issueD, but still offers weak values for my high-priority issueA and issueB, so I will concede mainly on lower-weight issueE while keeping my core preferences intact.

I am targeting a high but slightly softened utility around 0.77 since it is still early at t=0.14 and the opponent’s offers remain low for me, though they have shown some movement on issueB and issueC. I am holding firm on my highest-weight issues A, B, and C, while conceding on lower-weight issues D and E where the opponent has repeatedly offered valueE.

I am still targeting a strong utility because the negotiation is early at t=0.16, but I will make a modest concession from my top bid to explore agreement. The opponent has recently conceded on issueA and sometimes issueC, while often pushing low values for issueB/issueD/issueE, so I keep my most important issueA and issueC favorable while conceding some lower-weight ground.

I am targeting a still-strong early-game utility around 0.73, conceding mainly on lower/medium-weight issues while holding firm on my most important issueA and issueC. The opponent has sometimes offered issueC: valueB and once issueA: valueA / issueB: valueB, but their latest bid fell back in utility to me, so I should not concede too much at t=0.18. I am varying my last bid by improving issueD slightly while keeping a concession on issueB and issueE.

I am targeting a still-high utility bid around 0.72 because it is early at t=0.20, so I should not concede heavily yet. The opponent’s offers remain low for me overall and inconsistent, though they have shown some willingness on issueA/valueA and issueC/valueB, so I keep my high-weight priorities while conceding more on lower-weight issueD and issueE.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.72 because it is early-mid negotiation at t=0.22, so I should not concede on high-weight issueA or issueC yet. The opponent has intermittently offered favorable values on issueC and once on issueA, but their latest offer is low for me overall, so I am mainly conceding on lower-weight issueD/issueE while keeping a compromise on issueB.

At t=0.24 I am still targeting a relatively high-utility bid while making meaningful concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s latest valid offer conceded issueA to my best value and issueB to my second-best value, and they have previously offered issueC:valueB, so I will hold firm on issueC while giving flexibility on issueD and issueE.
